text:
Correction: It should always say "/boot/fonts" (plural) instead of "/boot/font" in the description above.

Furthermore, /boot/fonts only contains:

[0]# ls /boot/fonts
10x18.fnt.gz    12x24.fnt.gz    6x12.fnt.gz     8x16.fnt.gz     INDEX.fonts
10x20.fnt.gz    14x28.fnt.gz    8x14.fnt.gz     8x16b.fnt.gz
11x22.fnt.gz    16x32.fnt.gz    8x14v.fnt.gz    8x16v.fnt.gz
[0]# 

-- Martin
